overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit elevated walkways, glass floors with digital advertisements, and towering buildings with vibrant cyan and purple lighting. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showcasing high-quality ray-traced reflections and atmospheric neon lighting.

circular neon sign with pink and blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered concrete plaza with artificial lighting. The camera moves forward past a concrete bench and potted tree on the left, approaching red and purple vending machines. The environment is sheltered with no sky visible, featuring a semi-enclosed architectural layout.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with transparent glass floor advertisements

events.description: exits covered plaza onto open elevated walkway with transparent glass floor showing digital advertisements below

agents.ego_description: stepping onto glass floor overlook with view of city street and traffic below, moving toward the railing

entered.detail: transparent glass floor panels displaying illuminated digital advertisements underneath
tall modern skyscraper with glass facade and interior lighting
multi-story building with vertical purple neon accent lighting
city street visible below the elevated walkway with moving vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from enclosed to open as the camera moves onto an elevated walkway with a transparent glass floor displaying digital advertisements. The view opens to reveal a city street below with sparse traffic and towering glass buildings illuminated against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking neon-lit city street with traffic

tall building with extensive cyan and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left along the elevated walkway, revealing a sweeping view of the neon-lit cityscape. Moderate traffic moves along the street below, while a silhouetted figure stands by the railing on the left. The architecture features towering glass buildings with vibrant cyan and purple neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with illuminated glass floor sections

events.description: passes by seated person on bench, temporarily blocking view of street below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway passing a seated person and looking down at illuminated glass floor advertisements

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench facing the street below

entered.detail: transparent floor panels displaying colorful digital advertisements
modern building with grid-patterned windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated walkway, the camera passes a person sitting on a bench on the left. The walkway features sections of transparent glass floor displaying bright digital advertisements. The railing shifts to the right side as the path curves, with futuristic buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway approaching SECCHO commercial building

events.description: approaches the SECCHO building with large illuminated signage, entering a more enclosed commercial area

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow elevated walkway passing the SECCHO building and vending machines, approaching commercial entrance

notable_agents.action: person standing by railing looking at phone

yellow automated vending machine against wall

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows and becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches the SECCHO building, marked by prominent white neon signage. The camera passes pedestrians standing near the railing and entrance, with an 'OPEN' neon sign visible above a doorway. The environment shifts from open city views to a focused commercial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete plaza into a vast, neon-lit cityscape before narrowing back into a commercial corridor. It begins in a semi-enclosed area, moving past a concrete bench and potted tree toward red and purple vending machines. As the camera advances, the environment opens onto an elevated walkway with a transparent glass floor displaying digital advertisements, revealing towering glass buildings and a city street below. The scene then expands into a sweeping view of the skyline with vibrant cyan and purple accents as the camera turns left, passing a silhouetted figure and a seated person along the railing. Finally, the walkway narrows and becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches the SECCHO building, shifting from the open city vistas to a focused entrance marked by white neon signage and an open doorway.
